The REINZ Automated Valuation Model (AVM) uses advanced modelling and deep machine learning techniques to produce accurate estimates and up-to-date sales price predictions for residential properties in New Zealand. These figures should only be used as a price guide and with added consideration to features specific to the property which may not have been present at the time of prior sales. These estimates may also not take into consideration any proposed developmental or other changes. They must not be relied upon as a professional valuation and all usual due diligence should be carried out and appropriate professional advice obtained.
